text: Globalization initially modifies the patterns of behavior and cultural norms at the social level starting from a change in patterns of individual life and progressing to affect social norms and people’s preferences. Many changes have taken place at the social level due to the existence of cheap and abundant media at which people can gain access to world information and then absorb it and put it into practice even though they do not realize the consequences of these changes that have taken place in their lives due to globalization. Therefore, the present research applies qualitative descriptive approach in addition to library research approach. Qualitative descriptive research methods need considerable efforts including literature search and data analysis in order to shed light on the topic in question. In conclusion, globalization is a widespread term heard and talked about in our times and it also has a number of positive and negative effects, so the research concludes that globalization in the digital age has many facets and consequently requires special care and dealing in order to maintain cultural diversity of local communities while interacting with various cultures worldwide. Thus, the effect of globalization on local culture in the digital age has many pros and cons that must be managed properly for the maintenance of local cultures in the era of globalization, while trying to be compatible with global developments in all respects.
